rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax exemptions and has no bearing on art. VIII, §30, which prohibits certain taxes on securities market operators and securities transactions. The provisions are unrelated.
quote: Sec. 30. CERTAIN TAXES ON SECURITIES MARKET OPERATORS AND SECURITIES TRANSACTIONS PROHIBITED.
_note: No conflict identified. Tex. Const. art. VIII, §30 addresses securities transaction taxes and does not restrict or relate to residence homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
